programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programs.desc: The pilots of Northwest Airlines Flight #85 barely get their crippled 747 to Alaska for an emergency landing.

programs.desc: Flydubai Flight 981 enters a rapid descent and crashes nose-first at Rostov-on-Don Airport.

programs.title: Mayday: The Accident Files

programs.title: Mayday: The Accident Files
programs.desc: The consequences are disastrous when ice forms on an airplane's wings.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: Partnair Flight 394 is cruising at 22,000 feet -- when it suddenly begins diving toward the sea.
